zh.North Ockendon, Essex, England: 英國艾可諾斯 奧肯登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Poyntz於大約1355年出生在英國艾可諾斯 奧肯登時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz44歲，母親Eleanor de Erleigh42歲。他於大約1413年與Mrs. Edward Poyntz在英國英格蘭艾可諾斯 奧肯登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Poyntz于大约1355年出生在英国艾可諾斯 奧肯登时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz44岁，母亲Eleanor de Erleigh42岁。他于大约1413年与Mrs. Edward Poyntz在英国英格兰艾可諾斯 奧肯登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Poyntz was born about 1355, in North Ockendon, Essex, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz, was 44 and his mother, Eleanor de Erleigh, was 42. He married Mrs. Edward Poyntz about 1413, in North Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Poyntz est né environ 1355, à North Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Eleanor d’Erleigh, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Edward Poyntz environ 1413, à North Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Poyntzが約1355年にイギリスエセックスノース オクエンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntzは44歳，母Eleanor de Erleighは42歳であった。約1413年にイギリスイギリスエセックスノース オクエンドンでMrs. Edward Poyntzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Poyntz(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 에세스 노르스 옥켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Erleigh(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 노르스 옥켄던에서 Mrs. Edward Poyntz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Poyntz родился около 1355 г. в местности норт оккендон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 4th Baron Poyntz было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Erleigh, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Edward Poyntz около 1413 г. в местности норт оккендон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности Англия.
